summary: Completed testing of AI Operator Assistant feature (Iteration 11). All backend API tests pass (12/12). Frontend UI tests pass - AI floating button, panel, tabs, suggestions, and chat all working correctly. Real GPT-5.2 integration via Emergent Universal Key is functional.

issues: Chat message bubbles may need scroll adjustment to ensure latest messages are visible in the chat area

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/ai/operator-suggestion returns 200 with valid params
Backend API: Suggestion response has correct structure (suggestions, machine_name, stats)
Backend API: Suggestions are in Turkish language
Backend API: Invalid machine_id returns 404
Backend API: Missing params returns 422
Backend API: POST /api/ai/operator-chat returns 200 with valid payload
Backend API: Chat response has correct structure (response, session_id)
Backend API: Chat response is in Turkish
Backend API: Chat session continuity works (same session_id preserved)
Backend API: Missing message field returns 422
Backend API: Missing machine_id returns 422
Backend API: Chat history stored in MongoDB (verified via session continuity)
Frontend: Operator login with ali/134679 works
Frontend: Machine selection (33x33 ICM) works
Frontend: AI floating button visible at bottom-right (data-testid='ai-assistant-btn')
Frontend: Clicking AI button opens panel (data-testid='ai-assistant-panel')
Frontend: Panel has 'Oneriler' and 'Sohbet' tabs (data-testid='ai-tab-suggestions', 'ai-tab-chat')
Frontend: Suggestions tab shows stats cards (Bekleyen: 2, Koli/Saat: -, Defo: 0)
Frontend: AI suggestions text displayed in Turkish
Frontend: 'Yenile' button present (data-testid='ai-refresh-btn')
Frontend: Chat tab shows quick suggestion buttons
Frontend: Chat input field works (data-testid='ai-chat-input')
Frontend: Send button works (data-testid='ai-chat-send')
Frontend: Chat messages sent successfully to API
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing machine '33x33 ICM' (ID: acc11c05-5415-4291-b989-89424c860b63) with 2 pending jobs (Et Yiyelim, Laluna)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Operator Assistant feature fully tested. The floating AI button (data-testid='ai-assistant-btn') appears at bottom-right when a machine is selected in step 3 of operator flow. The panel has two tabs: 'Oneriler' (suggestions with stats cards) and 'Sohbet' (chat with quick buttons). AI uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent Universal Key - responses take 5-15 seconds. Chat history is stored in MongoDB 'ai_chat_history' collection. Machine '33x33 ICM' has 2 pending jobs for testing.
